message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 19:45 and should depart from cambridge
The train should go to ely and should leave on sunday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 2 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should serve british food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 14:15 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 13:15
Make sure you get the reference number
